repos.name: cbtenant
repos.description: Campaign Brain Tenant Manager — multi-tenant provisioning + service registry over cbauth (FastAPI, :32201)

repos.description: Marketing website for Campaign Brain — the CRM that grass-roots campaigns actually use

repos.description: Unified AI provider access behind one REST API (FastAPI/CBApp, :32281) with MCP, mesh registration, prompt-caching
